ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters or strings to strip from the heading when generating the filename. Separated by commas. This input is space sensitive.
ast.target: 生成文件名时要从标题中剔除的字符或字符串。用逗号分隔。此输入区分空格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ignore rule in RegEx format. All files listed below will get ignored by this plugin.
ast.target: 以正则表达式格式设置忽略规则。以下列出的所有文件都会被此插件忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether this plugin should trigger when a file is opened, and not just on save. Disable this when you notice conflicts with other plugins that also act on file open.
ast.target: 是否在打开文件时触发该插件，而不仅在保存时触发。当你发现与其他也在打开文件时起作用的插件冲突时，请禁用此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether this plugin should trigger when a file is saved. Disable this when you want to trigger sync only manually.
ast.target: 是否在保存文件时触发该插件。当你只想手动触发同步时，请禁用此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which Markdown heading style to use when creating new headings: Prefix ("# Heading") or Underline ("Heading\n===").
ast.target: 创建新标题时使用哪种 Markdown 标题样式：前缀（"# Heading"）或下划线（"Heading\n==="）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether this plugin should replace existing heading styles when updating headings.
ast.target: 更新标题时该插件是否应替换现有的标题样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string to use when insert Underline-style headings; should be some number of "="s.
ast.target: 插入下划线样式标题时使用的字符串；应为若干个"="。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in milliseconds before renaming the file after typing stops. This prevents frequent renames while typing. Default is 1000ms (2 seconds).
ast.target: 停止输入后重命名文件前的延迟（毫秒）。这可防止输入时频繁重命名。默认值为 1000ms（2 秒）。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义非法字符/字符串

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 忽略正则规则

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用文件打开钩子

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用文件保存钩子

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 缺少时插入标题

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 新标题样式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 替换标题样式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 下划线字符串

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 重命名防抖超时时间

ast.name: name
ast.target: 忽略当前文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将文件名同步到标题

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将标题同步到文件名

ast.name: text
ast.target: 文件名标题同步

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin will overwrite the first heading found in a file with the filename.
ast.target: 此插件会用文件名覆盖文件中找到的第一个标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If no header is found, will insert a new one at the first line (after frontmatter).
ast.target: 如果未找到标题，将在第一行（frontmatter 之后）插入一个新的标题。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 按正则表达式忽略的文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: All files matching the above RegEx will get listed here
ast.target: 所有匹配上述正则表达式的文件都会列在此处

ast.name: text
ast.target: 手动忽略的文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can ignore files from this plugin by using the "ignore this file" command
ast.target: 你可以使用“忽略此文件”命令让此插件忽略文件
